/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/build_dataset.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/build_dataset.dir/build_dataset.cpp.o -o build_dataset  -Wl,-rpath,/home/timofey/miniconda3/envs/guard-contest/lib /home/timofey/miniconda3/envs/guard-contest/lib/libparquet.so.2300.1.0 /home/timofey/miniconda3/envs/guard-contest/lib/libcrypto.so /home/timofey/miniconda3/envs/guard-contest/lib/libarrow.so.2300.1.0 -ldl -lrt
